remarks: Wake up just steps from the Saugatuck River, grab a coffee from your favorite local cafe, and enjoy the convenience of having Westport's best restaurants, boutiques, and the Metro-North train station all within walking distance.  This beautifully renovated 2-bedroom, 1-bath apartment combines timeless charm with fresh, modern finishes in one of Westport's most sought-after neighborhoods.  Spend mornings sipping coffee in your private backyard, afternoons strolling along the river or with your paddleboard, and evenings enjoying everything downtown Westport has to offer-all just minutes from your front door. Compo Beach also a short drive away!  Features you'll love:  Newly renovated throughout  2 spacious bedrooms | 1 full bath  Bright, modern kitchen and stylish finishes throughout  Private backyard space perfect for relaxing  Steps to the Saugatuck River  Walk to restaurants, coffee shops, shopping & Metro-North  Easy access to I-95 for a seamless NYC or Stamford commute  Whether you're commuting to the city or embracing the coastal Westport lifestyle, this home offers the perfect balance of location, comfort, and convenience.
